Description.enUS:
Anti-infantry specialist that deals area damage with each attack with a Shadowguard riding it. Can be upgraded to use Blink

Can attack ground and air units.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Moving units will not engage enemies.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Moving units will not engage enemies.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to cancel all orders and stop moving.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to cancel all orders and stop moving.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to stay where they are and attack enemies that are within range. Units will neither chase down enemies nor move to engage.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to stay where they are and attack enemies that are within range. Units will neither chase down enemies nor move to engage.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to patrol between their current position and the target area. Units will attack enemies and move to engage nearby enemies.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to patrol between their current position and the target area. Units will attack enemies and move to engage nearby enemies.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to move to the target point, fighting nearby enemies along the way. Targeting a unit with the Attack command orders that it be attacked until it is destroyed.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to move to the target point, fighting nearby enemies along the way. Targeting a unit with the Attack command orders that it be attacked until it is destroyed.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Scan-moving units will not engage enemies.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to move to the target area or follow the target unit. Scan-moving units will not engage enemies.

Tooltip.enUS: The Battlecat unleashes a deadly field of electricity each time it attacks. Deals 10 damage (20 against light) to nearby ground enemies.
Orders selected units to holster their weapons and avoid engaging enemies, unless given a direct command. Units holding fire will flee if attacked.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to holster their weapons and avoid engaging enemies, unless given a direct command. Units holding fire will flee if attacked.

Tooltip.enUS: Orders selected units to fire at will. They will engage enemy units within range and chase them as normal.
Tooltip.ruRU: Orders selected units to fire at will. They will engage enemy units within range and chase them as normal.

Tooltip.enUS: The Shadowguard is permanently cloaked.
Targeted unit is stunned for 8 seconds (3 seconds against heroic units).

A careful shot, dealing 150 damage. Ignores armor.

Can only target psionic.
Dismount the Shadowguard rider.
Sabotage the targeted building for 15.0 seconds. The building is deactivated during the sabotage and will take 350 damage at the end.
Teleports the Battlecat to a nearby target location.

The units will charge the enemies.

Click to make it only use ranged weapons.

The unit attack enemies with ranged weapon only.

Click to make it charge enemies.
